creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-06-12 01:35:04 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/exaile-devel   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    audio/exaile-devel/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump exaile-devel to 2.99.2 (aka 0.3 Alpha 2).
  
  While I am here, do some better sorting of the plist to make it easier for future maintenance.
  
  There's a known issue with the collection manager, where adding an album to the playlist
  causes the album entry to duplicate. Does not affect usability.
  
  PR:             ports/135431
  Submitted by:   "Joseph S. Atkinson" <jsa@wickedmachine.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.18      +3 -4      ports/audio/exaile-devel/Makefile
  1.10      +3 -3      ports/audio/exaile-devel/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -21     ports/audio/exaile-devel/files/patch-Makefile (dead)
  1.10      +242 -210  ports/audio/exaile-devel/pkg-plist
